title: Louis Brogan
extract:
Louis Brogan (born 6 May 2000) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row, loose forward or prop for the Leigh Leopards in the Betfred Super League.
He previously played for the Swinton Lions in the RFL Championship and RFL League One. Brogan has also spent time on loan from Leigh at Swinton and the Widnes Vikings in the Betfred Championship.
